title: parent-matches-option-ref: use Option<&IssueId> for clippy idiom
body:
# Goal

Cosmetic refactor of `parent_matches` in `crates/jjf/src/main.rs`
to use the idiomatic `Option<&IssueId>` parameter shape instead
of `&Option<IssueId>`. Forestalls clippy's `ref_option` lint and
matches the convention used by other helpers in the same file
(e.g. `&[T]` slices instead of `&Vec<T>`).

# Approach

- Change `fn parent_matches(issue: &Issue, wanted: &Option<IssueId>) -> bool`
  to `fn parent_matches(issue: &Issue, wanted: Option<&IssueId>) -> bool`.
- Update the two call sites (`run_ls`, `run_search`) to pass
  `parent_id.as_ref()` instead of `&parent_id`.
- No behavior change. Tests should pass unchanged.

# Source

Final whole-branch review of the `--parent` feature (2026-06-28
drop-epic-label) flagged this as a Minor item. Captured for
follow-up rather than blocking the original merge.

# Acceptance

- [ ] `parent_matches` signature takes `Option<&IssueId>`.
- [ ] Both call sites updated.
- [ ] `cargo nextest run --workspace` green.
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets` shows no new lints.
